ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "issue_code" TEXT /* Code of the security */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "securities_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., Stock certificates) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Company or entity that issued the security */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_price" TEXT /* Last traded price of the security */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the last traded price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time the market opens on that trading day */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time the market closes on that trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "total_trading_amount" TEXT /* Total trading amount for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "short_selling_volume" (
  "ssv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each short-selling volume record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total short-selling volume */,
  "volume_with_uptick" INTEGER /* Volume with uptick rule */,
  "volume_without_uptick" INTEGER /* Volume without uptick rule */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price at which the short-selling occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_volume_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_volume_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_volume_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volume" (
  "tv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of trading volume */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price at which the trading occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "short_selling_amount" (
  "ssa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each short-selling amount record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total short-selling amount */,
  "amount_with_uptick" TEXT /* Amount with uptick rule */,
  "amount_without_uptick" TEXT /* Amount without uptick rule */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price at which the short-selling occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_amount_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_amount_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_selling_amount_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_amount" (
  "ta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading amount record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "trading_amount" TEXT /* Total trading amount */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of trading amount */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price at which the trading occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_amount_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_amount_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_amount_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_bodies" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "regulatory_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the regulatory body */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the regulatory body operates */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory body */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who prepared the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_regulatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulatory_id") REFERENCES regulatory_bodies ("regulatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data sync */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last data sync (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the data collection */,
  "sync_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data sync process */,
  "record_count" INTEGER /* Number of records collected during the sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
